title: LLMs Are Demented
description: Solve a standard crossword puzzle while battling simulated memory evictions and temperature drift.

title: The Gating Crisis
description: Route multi-modal token streams to specialized expert models in a live gating network load-balancer.

title: Tokenizer Sandbox
description: Explore BPE tokenization. Understand character blindness, space inflation, and bypass security filters.

title: GPU Survivors
description: Survive training waves, collect FLOPs, and scale a neural network model to 1T parameters.

title: Token Factory
description: Design pipeline serving infrastructures. Route batch queues, page KV-caches, and run speculative drafters.

title: Vector Strike
description: Defend a vector database against adversarial semantic queries using custom dimensions and HNSW routing graph linkages.

title: Paged Attention
description: Scale context length dynamically using virtual page tables, block allocations, and zero-waste memory mappings.

title: Epoch Duel
description: Duel a local optimizer by configuring learning rates and momentum vectors to descend a loss landscape.

title: Model Kombat
description: Pick your model, charge your params, and evolve into MoE in this progressive-rendering fighting game.

title: Context Tower
description: Build an LLM prompt stack block-by-block. Balance instruction alignment and prevent base-level context collapse.

title: Censorship Dial
description: Balance helpfulness and harmlessness metrics in an RLHF policy training loop using dynamic parameters.
